requirement_text: bin/git-history-evidence.cjs classifies every commit into one of seven categories (feat/fix/refactor/docs/test/build/chore), cross-references changed files against TLA+ specifications via model-registry.json, identifies drift candidates where code evolved after its formal spec, and produces .planning/formal/evidence/git-history-evidence.json consumed by the nf-solve sweep pipeline as an informational residual
